femsolver
  • Core model
  • View page source

Core model

The model assembly layer: nodes, the model container, and DOF numbering.

Model — the top-level container, equivalent to OpenSees’ Domain.

class femsolver.core.model.Model(ndm, ndf)[source]

Bases: object

Container for nodes, elements, materials, constraints, and loads.

Parameters:

  • ndm (int) – Number of model dimensions (2 or 3).

  • ndf (int) – Default number of DOFs per node. Common combinations: (2,2)=2D truss, (2,3)=2D frame, (3,3)=3D truss, (3,6)=3D frame.

add_node(tag, *coords)[source]
Parameters:

tag (int)

Return type:

Node

Parameters:

tag (int)

Return type:

Node

Return type:

None

Parameters:

tag (int)

property elements
add_material(material)[source]
Return type:

None

material(tag)[source]
Parameters:

tag (int)

fix(node_tag, mask)[source]

Apply single-point constraints (boundary conditions) at a node.

Parameters:

  • node_tag (int)

  • mask (Iterable[int])

Return type:

None

add_mp_constraint(constraint)[source]
Return type:

None

Return type:

clear_loads()[source]
Return type:

None

number_dofs()[source]

Assign equation numbers to free DOFs. Fixed DOFs get -1.

Returns the number of free equations.

Return type:

int

property neq: int
element_dof_map(element)[source]

Return the global equation numbers for the DOFs of an element.

Return type:

ndarray

reset_results()[source]
Return type:

None

Nodes carry coordinates, DOF state, equation numbers, displacements, and reactions.
